title: Premium Clinical Skincare Brand – Logo, Label & Packaging Design
brief: Premium Clinical Skincare Brand – Logo, Label & Packaging Design Project Overview We are launching a new premium skincare brand and are looking for an experienced branding and packaging designer to create a cohesive visual identity for our product line. The initial scope includes: Brand logo design Product label design Product box / packaging design Visual identity system Brand color palette and typography Print-ready files and editable source files About the Brand Our brand focuses on clinically tested, science-backed skincare formulations designed to deliver effective results while maintaining a clean, modern, and trustworthy image. We are looking for a visual identity that communicates: Trust and credibility Clinical efficacy Premium quality Modern sophistication Simplicity and clarity Long-term brand value The goal is to create a brand that feels highly credible and professional while remaining approachable and desirable for everyday consumers. Design Direction We are seeking a Premium Clinical Skincare aesthetic. The design should feel: Clean and minimalist Modern and timeless Science-driven and trustworthy Premium without appearing overly luxurious Professional without looking pharmaceutical Sophisticated without feeling cold or sterile We appreciate strong typography, thoughtful use of whitespace, elegant layouts, and subtle premium details. The overall visual direction should balance: Clinical credibility Premium aesthetics Modern simplicity Consumer appeal Product Li
